steps.title: Interpret the equation as breaking down the total jam
steps.content: The equation $4x + 6y = 36$ represents how 36 cups of jam are distributed. Since $x$ is the number of small containers and $y$ is the number of large containers, the terms $4x$ and $6y$ must each represent amounts of jam in cups, not container counts.

steps.title: Decode what each coefficient represents
steps.content:
In $4x$: the coefficient 4 represents cups per small container.

Multiplying by $x$ (the number of small containers) gives the total cups in small containers.

In $6y$: the coefficient 6 represents cups per large container.

Multiplying by $y$ (the number of large containers) gives the total cups in large containers.

steps.title: Identify what 6y represents
steps.content: $6y$ represents (6 cups per large container) times (the number of large containers), which is the total cups of jam in the large containers. That matches choice C — C is correct.
